results.title: shadcn.io
results.description: shadcn.io is an AI-native premium React component library and resource for shadcn/ui, providing essential UI components, advanced patterns, AI integrations, charts, animations, and hooks built with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Radix UI for modern application development.

results.title: shadcn/ui
results.description: shadcn/ui is a collection of beautifully designed, accessible UI components and a code distribution platform that works with your favorite frameworks. It provides open code for customization and composition, enabling you to build your own component library.

results.title: Shadcn Solid
results.description: shadcn/ui, but for Solid.

results.title: Shadcn UI
results.description: shadcn/ui provides accessible and customizable UI components that can be copied and pasted into your applications, allowing you to build your own component library.

results.title: Shadcn UI MCP Server
results.description: A TypeScript-based MCP server that scrapes and caches shadcn/ui component information, providing structured data for AI assistants to access documentation and examples.

results.title: Shadcn
results.description: Shadcdn provides shadcn/ui as an ESM module hosted on a CDN for easy integration into projects.

results.title: Shadcn Glass UI
results.description: A Glassmorphism UI library for React that is AI-friendly, featuring 55+ components, strict TypeScript, and comprehensive documentation for modern web development.

results.title: Shadcn UI
results.description: A curated list of awesome things related to shadcn/ui, featuring libraries, components, and tools for building user interfaces.

results.title: Shadcn Editor
results.description: Lexical base rich text editor using shadcn/ui components

results.title: MkDocs Shadcn
results.description: MkDocs Shadcn is an unofficial port of shadcn/ui to MkDocs that provides a modern, customizable theme with support for extensions like admonitions, tabs, and custom plugins like ECharts and Excalidraw.

results.title: Shadcn UI MCP Server
results.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server providing AI assistants with access to shadcn/ui v4 components, blocks, demos, and metadata for React and Svelte frameworks.

results.title: Shadcn Svelte
results.description: shadcn/ui, but for Svelte. ✨

results.title: shadcn/ui Blocks
results.description: A curated list of components, libraries, boilerplates, tools, and inspirations related to shadcn/ui, facilitating the creation of custom component libraries.

results.title: Shadcn Rails
results.description: shadcn/ui on Rails provides customizable, copy-pasteable components for Rails applications, inspired by shadcn/ui, to help build your own component library.

results.title: Streamlit Shadcn UI
results.description: Streamlit Shadcn UI allows developers to integrate shadcn-ui components into their Streamlit applications for enhanced user interfaces.

results.title: Shadcn UI
results.description: Shadcn UI is an open-source collection of beautifully-designed, accessible UI components built with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Radix UI, offering a CLI for installation and supporting multiple frameworks like Next.js, Vite, and Remix.

results.title: Shadcn Resize Sidebar
results.description: A shadcn/ui drag-to-resize sidebar component for Next.js with persistent state, VS Code-like behavior, and advanced customization options.

results.title: electron-shadcn
results.description: A production-ready, feature-rich scaffold for building beautiful, modern desktop applications with Electron, React, and Shadcn/UI.

results.title: Shadcn UI for Flutter
results.description: Shadcn UI for Flutter is a UI library bringing Shadcn-style components to Flutter, enabling seamless integration with Material and Cupertino apps and offering extensive theming and bundled utilities.

results.title: Flutter Shadcn UI
results.description: Flutter Shadcn UI is a collection of customizable UI components for Flutter, ported from the popular shadcn/ui library.

results.title: shadcn-vue
results.description: shadcn-vue is a collection of re-usable UI components for Vue and Nuxt applications, ported from shadcn/ui.

results.title: Flutter Shadcn UI
results.description: Flutter Shadcn UI is a Flutter UI library that provides Shadcn-style components and allows simultaneous integration with Material and Cupertino design systems.

results.title: Shadcn Studio
results.description: Shadcn Studio is an open-source and premium collection of copy-and-paste shadcn components, blocks, and templates, paired with a powerful theme generator and AI tools to craft, customize, and ship user interfaces faster.

results.title: Shadcn Vue
results.description: shadcn-vue is an unofficial community-led Vue port of shadcn/ui, offering accessible and customizable components to build your own component library.

results.title: Shadcn UI Map
results.description: A map component built with Leaflet and React Leaflet, designed to integrate seamlessly with shadcn/ui.

results.title: Shadcn Svelte
results.description: shadcn/ui, but for Svelte. ✨

results.title: Shadcn Tour
results.description: A component designed to create interactive product tours with motion, seamlessly integrated with shadcn/ui.

results.title: shadcn/vue
results.description: shadcn/vue is an unofficial, community-led Vue port of shadcn/ui, offering re-usable components built with Reka UI and Tailwind CSS that can be copied or added via CLI.

results.title: shadcn-rs
results.description: A minimalist egui component set with shadcn/ui aesthetics, implemented as a Rust workspace for UI component libraries.

results.title: Shadcn Map
results.description: A map component built for shadcn/ui, following the same design patterns and styles, providing interactive mapping using Leaflet with React Leaflet.
